title: bromus sterilis var. krausei
intro: Bromus sterilis var. krausei, also known as the sterile brome grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Bromus sterilis var. krausei is typically used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
